spec_note: No docs/retail-jarvis-spec.md exists. Audit run against website-section-authoring canonical ordering and website-tone-of-voice rules.

findings.issue: Sponsor 'Salman Saudagar' framing retained from prior page. Cornerstone PDF lists him as a co-author, not separately as sponsor. The sponsor label adds no information beyond co-author already shown.
findings.fix: Either (a) drop the Sponsor stat tile and let the Co-authors tile carry it, or (b) keep Sponsor label only if a separate explicit sponsor mandate is sourced. Recommend (a).

findings.issue: Fynd DRI 'Devam Gosalia · Saaket Chawali' retained from prior page. Compilation folder does not name them; assignment is consistent with /catalog and /autonomous, so cross-page inference holds, but the immediate source folder does not back the names.
findings.fix: Acceptable based on cross-page consistency (/catalog row 183 names Devam · Saaket on Retail Jarvis Customer Listening). No action; flag for source confirmation if a Jarvis-specific spec is later authored.

findings.issue: Each card is pilled 'Demo' which is not a register-standard pill (the canonical set is Live / Pilot / Build / Roadmap). 'Demo' is descriptive but inconsistent.
findings.fix: Replace 'Demo' pill with 'Build · Demo on 5943' or simply 'Build' — keeps the four-pill convention. Currently rendered as pill-build colour, so visual consistency is intact; only the label differs.

findings.issue: Cornerstone date stat shows '26 - Nov - 2025' (with spaces) — site convention. But the citation eyebrow on §08 source 02 shows '01 - May - 2026' (correct) while §08 source 01 author byline shows '26 - Nov - 2025'. Date format is consistent with spaces — confirmed contiguous.

Page has eight contiguous sections (§01-§08) per canonical ordering. §07 Actions is positioned before §08 Sources — slight deviation from the default canonical order which puts Sources last after a Roadmap or Vision section. Here there is no separate Roadmap/Vision because the cornerstone is foundational and Production rollout is already covered in §01 Status.
findings.fix: Acceptable. Document override in §9 Decisions of any future spec: 'no separate Roadmap/Vision section because Production rollout is covered in §01 Status; Actions & Feedback is the closing operational beat before Sources.'

findings.issue: /catalog row 183 reads 'Retail Jarvis (Customer Listening) · Build · multi-sensor fusion (CCTV · audio · POS · NPS) · DPDP-compliant'. Page now reframes around four core outputs and three signal families (offline · online · external) rather than a multi-sensor fusion phrasing. Light drift, still consistent.
findings.fix: Optional update to catalog row to align: 'Build · sensing engine · 4 outputs · Demo on Store 5943 · DPDP-compliant'. Defer until next catalog sweep.

fixes_applied_this_pass: Renaming · 18-Mar-2026 unsourced date removed; relabelled to 'Re-housing · CX-sensing layer of Impetus per Farooq'.
Cornerstone link suffixed with .pdf for download clarity.
Cornerstone description updated to note working-note rev 16-Dec-2025 (matches PDF header).
Source 03 description softened: 'Re-housed under Impetus' (fact) instead of 'to be re-housed' (date-implied).
DPDP-compliant claim grounded with cornerstone citation: 'silhouette / posture CV only (non-biometric), per cornerstone Section 2C'.

Home page (index.html:639) Retail Jarvis card resynced to new framing: 'Predictive, non-intrusive CX sensing. Signals → engine → playbooks. Four scores · Readiness, CX, Friction, Churn. Demo on Store 5943.'
strengths: Source rigour · every numerical claim in §04 Demo product surfaces (Footfall 10,265, Trial 3,593, queue 3-5 min, ₹1,450 avg bill, ~6,186 walk-outs, +5pts CXS) is traceable to one of the five Jarvis console screenshots.

Cornerstone fidelity · the four-principle framing (operational reality first → behaviour reveals truth → bottom-up build → external context) and the four-stage engine (Readiness → Journey → Behaviour → AI Inference) are read from cornerstone Sections 1-2 verbatim.
Architecture diagram embedded · cornerstone-page-1 Signals → Engine → Playbooks diagram is extracted (pdfimages -j) and rendered with lightbox at sensible max-width 1100px.
Signal inventory completeness · §06 reproduces the cornerstone basic / intermediate / advanced offline + online tables in full (24 + 24 rows) with feeds-output mapping.
Honesty pills consistent · Live (cornerstone shipped), Build (demo), Roadmap (production rollout) are pinned and contradicted nowhere on the page.
removed_from_prior_page: Sub-IPs · 11-card grid claiming NPS Intelligence / Silent NPS / NPS Fraud Engine / Anomaly Detection / Customer journey clustering / Cross-channel signal fusion / Lovable proto / Feedback loop into store ops / Re-engagement triggers / NPS dashboard / Cornerstone doc — these were Impetus-anchored claims, not Retail Jarvis cornerstone material.
Pulse Point '17 stores · 33 users · 2,948 tasks live' adoption stat — belongs on /impetus, not Retail Jarvis.
'7-Eleven wedge live' / nps.jioimpetus.com claim — belongs on /autonomous and /impetus.
Sense → Analyze → Act → Verify framing — replaced with the cornerstone-true Signals → Engine → Playbooks → Feedback.
Connections section (Inputs / Consumers cards) — implicit in the cornerstone diagram now embedded in §03.
Roadmap Q1-Q4 strip — not in source compilation; replaced with §01 Status three-card framing (Cornerstone shipped · Demo running · Production rollout).
